verses.text: Tu-in Gilgal panin Bokhim-ah Topa' vantung mi paito hi. Amah in Israel mite kiangah, “Egypt panin note kong paipihto a, na pu na pate uh tungah piak dinga ka ciam leitangah note kong paipih hi. Keimah in, ‘Note tawh ka thuciam ka siasak ngei kei ding a

hih gama teng mite tawh thuciamna na bawl kei ding uh hi. Amau' biakna taute na susia ding uh hi,’ ka hong ci hi. Ahih hangin note in ka thupiakna na mang kei uh hi. Bang hangin lehgamtat na hi uh hiam
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in keimah in note' mai-ah amaute ka hawlkhia kei ding hi. Amaute pen note' lang suak ding uh a, a pasian-te uh note-a' dingin thang antah hi ding hi,” a ci hi
Topa' vantung mi in Israel mi khempeuh tungah hih thute a gen ciangin mite a kap uh hi
Tua ahih manin tua mun pen Bokhim, ci-in min phuak uh a, tua lai munah Topa' tungah biakna a pia uh hi.
Joshua in mite ciahsak a, Israel mite zong leitang luah dingin amau' gamh ciatah pai uh hi
Mite in Joshua' nuntak sung leh, Israel-te-a' dingin Topa' sepsa na lian khempeuh a mu, Joshua sanga sau a nungta zawte khempeuh nuntak sungin Topa' na sem uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa' nasem ahi, Nun' tapa Joshua, a khan' kum za leh kum sawm khat a phak laitakin a si hi
Amaute in Gaash Mual leilu lam, Efraim mualtung gamsung, Timnathheres-a ama luahna huam sungah a vui uh hi
Tua ciangin tua khangmite khempeuh zong si khin uh a, amaute' khit ciangin Topa hita leh, Israel-te-a' dingin a septe hita leh a theilo khangthak hong piang uh hi.
Tua ciangin Israel mite, Topa' muhna-ah a sia gamta-in Baal-te' na sem uh hi
Egypt panin amaute a paikhiatpih a pu a pate uh Pasian ahi Topa amaute in nusia uh hi. Amau' kiima om mite' pasian dangte' nung zui-in, tuate' mai-ah kun uh a, amaute in Topa hehsak uh hi
Amaute in Topa nusia uh a, Baal-te leh Ashtaroth pasian-te bia uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te tungah Topa sinso a, amaute' na a sut, mi' na a sut thei mite' tungah amaute a pia hi. A kiima om a galte uh tungah amaute pia a, amaute in a galte uh nangzo nawnlo uh hi

Galsim dingin amaute a kuankhiat sialun, Topa in a hilhkholhsa leh Topa in amaute tungah a kiciamsa bangin amaute' langkhatah a sia lamin Topa pang hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in lungkhamna tuak uh hi
Tua ciangin, amaute' na a sutgawp mite' vangliatna panin amaute a honkhia thukhente Topa in khangsak hi

Ahi zongin amaute in a thukhente uh thu ngailo uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in pasian dangte bia-in tuate' mai-ah kun uh hi. Topa' thupiakna a mang amau' pute pate' tot lampi panin amaute pial pah uh a, amaute in Topa' thu manglo uh hi

Topa in amaute-a' dingin thukhente a khan'sak sialin Topa in thukhente huh a, thukhente' nuntak sung tawntung a galte uh khutsung panin amaute hon hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute a gimsak a nengniamte' hangin amau' tauna in Topa' hehpihna ding piangsak hi

Ahih hangin thukhente a sih peuhpeuh ciangin amaute kihei kikin a pu a pate uh sangin a siazaw-in gamta zel uh hi. Adang pasian-te' nung zui uh a, amaute' na semin a mai uhah kun uh hi. Amaute' gamtatnate uh ahi a, a lungkhauhnate uh ahi zongin khialo uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te tungah Topa heh mahmah a, amah in, “Hih mite in amau' pulepate' tungah ka thupiak ka thuciamna khialin keima thu ngailo uh ahih manin
Joshua a sih lai-in a nusiat minamte khat zong tu-a kipanin amaute' mai-ah ka hawlkhia kei ding hi
Amau' pute pate in Topa' lampi a zuih bangin zuih ding a don uh hiam, a don kei uh hiam, cih a kitheihna dingin hih mite tawh Israel mite ka ze-et ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa in tua minamte thakhatin hawlkhia loin koihcing a, Joshua' khutsungah amaute pialo hi.
